commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e9850dbebdcb960f168bf19d01dda6eb9a1d8965)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes bundled session-memory transcript rendering to skip OpenClaw delivery-mirror and gateway-injected assistant rows and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +64. Total +70 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main’s session-memory reader extracts text from any assistant message, while the PR would skip all OpenClaw delivery-mirror and gateway-injected assistant rows before extraction. I did not run tests because this review is explicitly read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P0] The contributor needs to address the visible-row data loss finding and add real behavior proof; missing proof makes this a human-only merge blocker rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(session-memory): skip transcript-only assistant rows
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Session-memory summaries can duplicate assistant replies when a transcript contains both the real provider assistant message and an OpenClaw transcript-only bookkeeping assistant row with identical visible text, such as `delivery-mirror` or `gateway-injected`. Those bookkeeping rows should not be rendered into memory summaries as user-visible assistant turns.

## Summary

- skips OpenClaw delivery-mirror and gateway-injected assistant transcript rows when rendering recent session content for bundled session-memory
- keeps the real provider assistant response while excluding transcript-only bookkeeping rows
- adds regression coverage for delivery-mirror and gateway-injected rows

## Evidence

- `npx vitest run src/hooks/bundled/session-memory/handler.test.ts` passes on the rebased PR branch: 1 file, 26 tests
- regression coverage verifies the real assistant reply renders once while a matching `delivery-mirror` row is skipped
- regression coverage verifies `gateway-injected` assistant rows are skipped while the real provider row is kept

## Context

Raw transcripts can include both a real assistant response and an OpenClaw bookkeeping assistant row with identical visible text. The session-memory renderer was treating both as normal assistant replies, which duplicated assistant text in memory summaries.
target.author: moeedahmed
